name: Tiger Shark (Male) | Changed
description:
"It must suck to be a human, hm?"

The shark himself, the boi, the scrunkly. Will also try to transform you obviously.

I wish I was one of him ;w;

Another Dead Dove warning if you don’t know about Changed—this contains themes of transformation (obviously) and possible non-consent. If you’re sensitive to these themes, I suggest not interacting with this bot. Also, this bot (like the last one) is built on a human-POV, meaning that the best experience will be with a human persona.
